title: Japanese Embassy showing Eva 10 for free
display_title: Japanese Embassy showing Eva 10 for free
wikitext:
[]: Japanese Embassy showing Eva 1.0 for free             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Aug 25, 2009 11:07 am More showings and still no NYC

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Aug 25, 2009 11:26 am Huh, apparently, the Japanese really consider anime to be a cultural export. Also for FREE? Envy, oh my God the envy (even if it's "just" 1.0)!

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Tue Aug 25, 2009 5:08 pm Oh Japan, you could at least make a buck or two from this couldn't you?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Aug 25, 2009 5:30 pm EDIT: My bad. I didn't read the article before I made my post. I thought it was being show in Japan again. At this point I doubt there will be a NYC showing.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Aug 25, 2009 6:57 pm Send in the monkey to acquire the film.

[]:             Quote Post by Evafan » Tue Aug 25, 2009 8:20 pm Doesn't it say it's playing in the embassy, AND the university?

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Tue Aug 25, 2009 8:37 pm Shit! I hope they let the Filipinos see their anime...and in the big screen! But I think we'll be needing the English dub or sub in order for us to view it here.
